text: Inside Savannah Guthrie's 'Today' Return Amid Mom's Disappearance - Variety

text: Lakers’ Luka Doncic injury nightmare started with an inexplicable JJ Redick decision in historic blowout - New York Post

text: Artemis II is officially on its way to the moon - The Washington Post

text: Iran hits Gulf refineries as Trump warns U.S. will attack Iranian bridges, power plants - NPR

text: Pollen allergy season is here and getting longer every year, but not because of climate change - earth.com

text: Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims against Justin Baldoni tossed out but robust case remains - NPR
fullText: Blake Lively's sexual harassment claims against Justin Baldoni over the movie "It Ends With Us" were dismissed Thursday by a federal judge who left intact three claims, including retaliation, that will let a jury hear many of the allegations anyway.
